expectations.evidence: app/Services/TurboPartnerService.php and config/services.php exist as TurboPartner config/service files

No file calls TurboPartner::configure or creates a TurboPartner client with partner API key. TurboPartnerService.php manually builds HTTP requests using Http::baseUrl() instead of using the SDK. config/services.php uses 'api_key' key (env('TURBODOCX_API_KEY')) not 'partner_api_key'.
routes/api.php defines Route::prefix('organizations')->group() with Route::get, Route::post, Route::patch, Route::delete
OrganizationController extends Controller, uses response()->json(), Request $request injection, and $request->validate()
.env contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY and TURBODOCX_PARTNER_ID but NOT TURBODOCX_PARTNER_API_KEY. The variable naming is wrong — it uses TURBODOCX_API_KEY instead of TURBODOCX_PARTNER_API_KEY.
.env contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY= which is a sign var. The user only asked for TurboPartner.
Generated files use .php extension (OrganizationController.php, TurboPartnerService.php, services.php, api.php, etc.)
